name: giant SOLAR OVEN
description: I'm in a giant SOLAR OVEN
items_start: Large dark lens set in ceiling
hints: A solar oven with a nail file and a lens in the ceiling. The lens focuses sunlight.
GET FILE - the nail file can be sharpened into a stake or used as a weapon. The lens is important during daytime.
The nail file can be made into a stake for the vampire. The solar oven could be deadly during daytime when the sun shines through the lens.
GET FILE (sharpen into a stake to kill the vampire). The solar oven is dangerous during daytime - the lens focuses sunlight. WEST returns to kitchen.
notes: Solar oven with a nail file (can become a stake) and a dark lens that focuses sunlight. Dangerous during daytime when the sun activates the lens. WEST returns to the kitchen (room 12). The file is essential for making a stake.
